name: Cranberry Nut Muffins 2
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups Cranberries (fresh or frozen and coarsely chopped)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium mixing bowl, combine the flour, sugar, baking powder, salt, and baking soda.
2. Stir in the orange juice, orange peel, shortening, and beaten egg until well blended.
3. Mix in the cranberries and nuts (if used) and pour batter into greased muffin tins.
4. Bake at 350 degrees F for 20 to 25 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center of a muffin comes out clean. Use a shorter baking time if using small muffin tins.
